source.definition: a device that sprays water for washing the body, commonly found in bathrooms

explanation.sourceText: The English word "shower" originally referred to a sudden fall of rain or water and later came to mean a device that sprays water for bathing.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „shower“ se referea inițial la o cădere bruscă de ploaie sau apă și ulterior a ajuns să desemneze un dispozitiv care pulverizează apă pentru baie.

source.additional: A shower can also be considered a refreshing daily ritual.

target.definition: un dispozitiv pentru a te spăla cu apă, adesea asocia cu o baie

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian word "duș" also derives from the French "douche" and refers to the sanitary device for body cleansing.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul românesc „duș“ provine din franceza „douche“ și desemnează dispozitivul pentru spălat.

target.additional: Im modernen Leben ist eine Dusche ein wichtiges Element der Hygiene.

examples.sourceText: I take a shower every morning.
examples.targetText: Mă fac duș în fiecare dimineață.

examples.sourceText: The shower in the hotel is very modern.
examples.targetText: Dușul din hotel este foarte modern.

examples.sourceText: I enjoy a hot shower after a long day.
examples.targetText: Îmi place să fac un duș cald după o zi lungă.

examples.sourceText: The shower has several water jets.
examples.targetText: Dușul are mai multe duze de apă.

examples.sourceText: A shower becomes indispensable in my daily life.
examples.targetText: Un duș devine indispensabil în viața mea de zi cu zi.

learningTips.text: Remember the Romanian word "duș" sounds like the English "dush" in "hush" but with a 'd'—it means shower, so think of water rushing quietly.
Think of the English word "shower" and the Romanian "duș" both involving water falling—imagine a refreshing splash to link them.
To recall "duș", picture yourself enjoying a warm shower after a long day, feeling relaxed and clean.
Associate "duș" with the English word "douche" (borrowed from French), which also means a water spray—this helps connect the meaning.
